hero.title: Generate publishable data-collection scenarios with AI and templates
hero.description:
AI AgentFactory helps teams start from one prompt or a proven template, then generate forms, Typeform-like flows, submissions, Webhook delivery and basic analytics.
Capture real business data first, then expand into Agent, workflow and deeper automation capabilities.

announcement.label: MVP
announcement.title: Start with a runnable form template

hero.tip: Current focus: form generation, templates, page Agent, Webhook and submissions

branding.title: The current technical foundation already covers website, console, auth, payments, i18n and data access

introduce.name: introduce
introduce.title: What AI AgentFactory is
introduce.label: MVP Positioning
introduce.description: It first turns form generation, templates, page Agents, publishing, submissions and Webhook delivery into one runnable loop so teams can validate real scenarios quickly.

items.title: Template-first
items.description: Start from proven scenarios such as leads, registration, feedback and receipts instead of learning from a blank page.

items.title: AI generation and refinement
items.description: Generate a form from one prompt, then ask the page Agent to adjust fields, copy and structure.

items.title: Publishing and integration loop
items.description: Share the generated form, collect submissions and push results to Feishu, DingTalk or your own systems through Webhooks.

benefit.name: benefit
benefit.title: Why start with templates and forms
benefit.label: Core Value
benefit.description: Users do not want to learn a complex platform first. They want a runnable scenario they can edit, publish and use immediately.

items.title: Easier onboarding
items.description: Templates provide a concrete starting point. Users see the finished shape first, then tailor it with AI.

items.title: Faster value validation
items.description: A form can move from generation to publishing quickly, which is useful for market validation, internal pilots and demos.

items.title: More natural expansion
items.description: Once real submissions exist, Agents, workflows, OCR and integrations have meaningful business context.

usage.name: usage
usage.title: From template to launch in 4 steps
usage.description: The current MVP path is intentionally simple: choose a template, generate and refine, publish, then collect data.

items.title: Choose a template
items.description: Start from lead capture, event registration, feedback, receipt collection and other common scenarios.

items.title: Generate a draft
items.description: Add business context in one prompt and generate the title, description, fields and Typeform-like flow.

items.title: Refine with the Agent
items.description: Ask the page Agent to adjust fields, reduce questions, change required rules and improve copy.

items.title: Publish and collect
items.description: Share a link or QR code, collect submissions and push results to downstream systems through Webhooks.

feature.name: feature
feature.title: Core capabilities in the current MVP
feature.description: The priority is to stabilize the shortest valuable loop before stacking long-term platform concepts.

items.title: AI form generation
items.description: Generate savable form schemas from natural language with DeepSeek / OpenAI provider support.

items.title: Template catalog
items.description: Includes 20 universal templates, with 8 high-frequency templates highlighted on the homepage.

items.title: Typeform-like flow
items.description: Generated forms support one-question-at-a-time filling, which works well for mobile and sharing.

items.title: Page Agent
items.description: Provides contextual help across pages for generation, analysis, publishing and configuration.

items.title: Webhook delivery
items.description: Supports Feishu, DingTalk, WeCom and generic Webhooks with logs and retry support.

items.title: Submission dashboard
items.description: View submissions, OCR status, delivery status and Agent-generated data summaries.

showcase.name: showcase
showcase.title: Template scenarios for early validation
showcase.description: These scenarios are common, lightweight and suitable for later expansion into Agents, OCR and workflows.

items.title: Lead Capture
items.description: Collect prospects from websites, landing pages and events for sales follow-up

items.title: Event Registration
items.description: Registration for conferences, salons, webinars and offline events

items.title: Satisfaction Survey
items.description: Collect product, service, store or delivery feedback

items.title: Product Recommendation
items.description: Collect needs and preferences for lead segmentation

items.title: Consultation Booking
items.description: Book courses, consulting sessions, stores and services

items.title: Invoice and Receipt Collection
items.description: Collect expense documents and prepare for OCR structuring

items.title: Beta Feedback
items.description: Collect test issues, experience scores and follow-up intent

items.title: Waitlist
items.description: Collect early users, product interest and launch candidates

stats.name: stats
stats.label: MVP Scope
stats.title: Run the shortest valuable loop first
stats.description: Templates, generation, filling, submission, Webhook delivery and data review are the core loop for this stage.

pricing.name: pricing

pricing.title: Delivery Modes
pricing.description: The homepage currently focuses on the MVP path and template scenarios. Commercial packaging can come later.

faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About AI AgentFactory
faq.description: The homepage answers template, generation, publishing and integration questions first.

items.title: What kind of product is this?
items.description: At this stage, it is an AI form generation and data collection system focused on helping users publish useful scenarios from templates and Agents.

items.title: Why templates?
items.description: Templates let users see a usable scenario immediately instead of learning from a blank page. They can pick a close fit and refine it with AI.

items.title: How is it different from ordinary form builders?
items.description: Traditional builders are mostly manual. AI AgentFactory aims to generate from a template or prompt, then keep refining, publishing and analyzing with a page Agent.

items.title: Does it support real submissions now?
items.description: Yes. Users can generate forms, save scenes, share public filling pages, collect submissions and configure Webhook delivery.

items.title: What does the Agent do today?
items.description: The Agent focuses on page context: generating forms, editing fields, summarizing submissions, analyzing data and helping with publishing configuration.

items.title: What comes next?
items.description: The next priorities are deeper templates, generation experience, real Agent tool use, OCR and workflows, always tied to user-visible value.

cta.name: cta
cta.title: Start your first scenario from a template
cta.description: Pick a template close to your business and let AI AgentFactory turn it into a publishable, collectible and integrable form.

brand.title: AI AgentFactory
brand.description: Start from templates and prompts to generate publishable, collectible and integrable data-collection scenarios.
